MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ADDRIENNE GEETER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-518551 WITH CASE CGC-12-518523.
Appearances: Peter J. Keith of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3908) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Case number 518551 is consolidated with Case number 518523 for all purposes. Case number 518523 is the lead case and all future filings shall be made in that case only. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
